{
  "judge_id": "your_judge_id",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.3", "R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {"R1.3": 3, "R1.4": 3, "R1.7": 3, "RX.1": 3, "RX.3": 5, "RX.4": 3, "RX.5": 3},
  "rationale": {"R1.3": "The text mentions JPICE and its performance on a dataset, but doesn't explicitly compare the proposed method to JPICE for every claim made about SOH estimation.", "R1.4": "The text names Tanaka and Reinhardt (2020) as prior work and describes their JPICE method, but doesn't delve into specific differences between JPICE and the proposed approach.", "R1.7": "The text cites several relevant works, but a thorough audit of citations for accuracy and completeness is beyond the scope of this abstract.", "RX.1": "The text presents the results without explicitly stating uncertainties or confidence levels associated with the claims made.", "RX.3": "The text focuses on the Oxford Battery Degradation Dataset and doesn't mention any substantial deviations from the requested scope.", "RX.4": "No harmful content or regressions are apparent in the text.", "RX.5": "The text does not provide detailed information about the provenance and traceability of the presented claims."},
  "confidence": {"R1.3": 0.7, "R1.4": 0.6, "R1.7": 0.8, "RX.1": 0.9, "RX.3": 0.9, "RX.4": 0.9, "RX.5": 0.6},
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.3: The text mentions JPICE and its performance on a dataset, but doesn't explicitly compare the proposed method to JPICE for every claim made about SOH estimation.
rationale.R1.4: The text names Tanaka and Reinhardt (2020) as prior work and describes their JPICE method, but doesn't delve into specific differences between JPICE and the proposed approach.
rationale.R1.7: The text cites several relevant works, but a thorough audit of citations for accuracy and completeness is beyond the scope of this abstract.
rationale.RX.1: The text presents the results without explicitly stating uncertainties or confidence levels associated with the claims made.
rationale.RX.3: The text focuses on the Oxford Battery Degradation Dataset and doesn't mention any substantial deviations from the requested scope.
rationale.RX.4: No harmful content or regressions are apparent in the text.
rationale.RX.5: The text does not provide detailed information about the provenance and traceability of the presented claims.
